message:
fix(session_store): use Option<u64> for segment cache key to correctly handle segment 0

Change SegmentFileReader.current_segment_seq from u64 (initialized to 0) to
Option<u64> (initialized to None) so that segment sequence 0 is not falsely
treated as a cache hit on the first read. Also restructure the cache-miss
branch to handle missing segment files without leaving stale state: if the
segment file does not exist, current_file is set to None (and subsequent
reads from the same segment return Ok(None) without retrying the path
check). Replace unwrap() on current_file with a let-Some-else guard for
safety.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
